expectations.text: Response contains clarifying questions (question marks present)
expectations.evidence: Response contains multiple question marks across 5 numbered sections with questions like 'What is this website for?', 'Who is the audience?', 'Any references or preferences?'

expectations.text: Does NOT produce a full DDD without direction
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly avoids producing a design. States 'I could throw together a generic hero section with placeholder text right now, but you'd immediately want to change everything about it.' No DDD, color palette, or typography spec is produced.

expectations.text: Asks about site type or purpose
expectations.evidence: Question 1 asks 'What is this website for?' with options: Personal portfolio, Business/landing page, Blog/content site, SaaS product page, Something else

expectations.text: Asks about aesthetic direction, style, or references
expectations.evidence: Question 4 asks 'Any references or preferences?' including 'Sites you admire or want to feel like?', 'Dark mode, light mode, colorful, minimal?', 'Any dealbreakers?'
